'''ngashutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrocide|iatrocide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrocide|iatrocide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngashutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæshitith|ngæshitith]] || [[word:ngæshitij|ngæshitij]] || [[word:ngæshitish|ngæshitish]] || [[word:ngæshiti|ngæshiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngashushututh|ngashushututh]] || [[word:ngashushutuj|ngashushutuj]] || [[word:ngashushutush|ngashushutush]] || [[word:ngashushutu|ngashushutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngashututh|ngashututh]] || [[word:ngashutuj|ngashutuj]] || [[word:ngashutush|ngashutush]] || [[word:ngashutu|ngashutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngashuftuth|ngashuftuth]] || [[word:ngashuftuj|ngashuftuj]] || [[word:ngashuftush|ngashuftush]] || [[word:ngashuftuf|ngashuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngashututhu|ngashututhu]] || [[word:ngashutuju|ngashutuju]] || [[word:ngashutushu|ngashutushu]] || [[word:ngashutuku|ngashutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngashututh|ngashututh]] || [[word:ngashutuj|ngashutuj]] || [[word:ngashutush|ngashutush]] || [[word:ngashutu|ngashutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngashututhul|ngashututhul]] || [[word:ngashutujul|ngashutujul]] || [[word:ngashutushul|ngashutushul]] || [[word:ngashutukul|ngashutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngashututhuthu|ngashututhuthu]] || [[word:ngashutujuju|ngashutujuju]] || [[word:ngashutushushu|ngashutushushu]] || [[word:ngashutuku|ngashutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngashututhun|ngashututhun]] || [[word:ngashutujun|ngashutujun]] || [[word:ngashutushun|ngashutushun]] || [[word:ngashutukun|ngashutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngashututhuoro|ngashututhuoro]] || [[word:ngashutujuoro|ngashutujuoro]] || [[word:ngashutushuoro|ngashutushuoro]] || [[word:ngashutukuoro|ngashutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
